summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 27/06/2024
DCE iron ore futures rose in the day. the main contract closed 819，an increase of 1.24% throughout the day;some traders quotation is still stronger, and Some steel mills purchased on demand. today's overall market transaction atmosphere in general.
